content: Sono miope e non riesco a leggere cosa c'è scritto su quel cartello.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:I am near-sighted, so I cannot make out what is written on that signboard
eng:I'm near-sighted, so I can't make out what is written on that signboard
